name: El Salvador Apaneca Santa Elena Pacamara Honey Medium (Med-Light→Med)
author: Gene Cafe Roast Profilist
description:
Adjusted lighter version of the original profile (was landing too dark). Target now is between medium-light and medium (City+ → Full City), keeping sweetness but with brighter top notes and less roast/bass.

Gene Cafe notes:
- Preheat empty to 205°C until stable.
- External fast cooling after DROP.

Timing formats in events:
- Elapsed mm:ss
- Gene-decimal minutes (min + sec/60, rounded to 0.1)
- Remaining time on Gene display (reverse countdown) aligned to total 13:15

Targets (for 250g Pacamara Honey):
- Drying end ~04:15–04:45 (yellowing)
- 1C goal window ~10:00–10:45
- Development goal ~02:15–02:45 after 1C start (≈18–21% dev ratio)
- Drop well before 2C (no rapid “tick-tick”)

End summary:
- Total planned roast time: 13:15
- Setpoints: 165°C (00:00–04:30), 235°C (04:30–09:45), brief 242°C assist (09:45–11:00), then 225°C development control (11:00–13:15)
- Main change vs darker version: earlier drop (-45s) and lower development setpoint (225°C vs 228°C) to reduce roast depth while keeping caramel sweetness.

beanInfo.origin: El Salvador — Apaneca Ilamatepec (Santa Elena / Ilamatepec terroir); Producer: Fernando Lima

events.label: Charge / Start (Drying)
events.instruction:
Preheat empty to 205°C until stable.
Load 250g. Set 13:15 total. Set 165°C and press Start.
Elapsed 00:00 (0.0) | Remaining 13:15 (13.3)

events.label: End Drying → 235°C
events.instruction:
Target: clear yellowing. Now increase to 235°C for Maillard.
Elapsed 04:30 (4.5) | Remaining 08:45 (8.8)

events.label: Listen for 1C soon
events.instruction:
Start listening closely for first crack (distinct snaps). Expect approach in the next 1–2 minutes.
Elapsed 09:00 (9.0) | Remaining 04:15 (4.2)

events.label: Short assist → 242°C
events.instruction:
Briefly push to 242°C to help 1C arrive cleanly. If 1C is already rolling strongly, you can shorten this step.
Elapsed 09:45 (9.8) | Remaining 03:30 (3.5)

events.label: Development Control → 225°C
events.instruction:
Set 225°C to keep development lighter and cleaner.
Aim: ~2:15–2:45 development after 1C start for Medium.
DROP well before any 2C “tick-tick” sounds.
Elapsed 11:00 (11.0) | Remaining 02:15 (2.3)

events.label: DROP / Cool
events.instruction:
Drop now for Medium (Med-Light→Med). Eject and cool externally fast (fan).

Next roast tweaks:
- Still too dark/roasty: drop 15–30s earlier OR reduce dev control to 223–224°C.
- Too light/peanutty or sharp: extend 15–30s OR keep 242°C for +15s before stepping down.
- Flat/baked: shorten the 165°C drying hold by 15–30s (raise to 235°C sooner).
Elapsed 13:15 (13.3) | Remaining 00:00 (0.0)
